title: Thila Command
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Thila Command''' was the official designation applied to [[Alliance High Command/Legends|Alliance High Command's]] temporary base of operations on the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Thila/Legends|Thila]].

==History==
After the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] evacuated the [[Great Temple/Legends|Great Temple]] on [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]] [[0 ABY/Legends|six months]] after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], High Command, in search of a suitable site to permanently relocate to, established itself within the catacombs of the planet Thila, already an established Rebel base.<ref name="GG3">''[[Galaxy Guide 3: The Empire Strikes Back]]''</ref>

The newly formed [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Group]], under the command of [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], permanently assigned to the High Command group, likewise transferred with High Command to the Thila base. [[Renegade Flight]], under the leadership of [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Arhul Narra/Legends|Arhul Narra]], were similarly assigned to Thila.<ref name="GG3" />

The Alliance employed [[Electrotelescope/Legends|electrotelescopes]] as an early-warning system at Thila Command. The passive [[Sensor/Legends|sensors]] detected incoming light and energy emissions, making them capable of being used without fear that the outpost would be discovered.<ref name="EGWT">''[[The Essential Guide to Weapons and Technology]]''</ref>

High Command only operated out of Thila for a period of months before being forced to evacuate with the threat of its secrecy potentially compromised. Rogue Group performed admirably during several skirmishes during the Thila campaign, assisting High Command in their evacuation efforts, proving their effectiveness.<ref name="GG3" /> When [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces descended on the Thila outpost, they were [[Ambush at Thila|ambushed]] by previously placed explosives.<ref name="SWE">''[[Star Wars: Empire: The Wrong Side of the War]]''</ref>

After Skywalker recommended the remote ice world of [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]] as a possible relocation site, High Command agreed to set up operations there. When the newly constructed [[Echo Base/Legends|Echo Base]] was completed in [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]], High Command moved there under the command of [[General/Legends|General]] [[Carlist Rieekan/Legends|Carlist Rieekan]].<ref name="GG3" />
